description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-overflow-menu` (T2-11) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-overflow-menu/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, trigger icon typed, placement typed, items typed
2. Accessibility — trigger button has accessible label ("More options" or custom), menu role, keyboard: Enter/Space opens, arrow navigation in menu, Escape closes, axe-core pass
3. Tests — trigger activation, keyboard nav, all placements, disabled items, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — standard overflow menu, with icons, in table row context
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (trigger, menu)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-overflow-menu/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-overflow-menu — T2-11 antagonistic quality review
